name: bazi_converter
description: Build bazi.input.v1 JSON from birth info using lunar-javascript.

scripts.build:qianli-lu-friend: node bin/build-bazi-json-from-pillars.js --pillars "乙巳 甲申 癸未 丙辰" --gender male --case-id qianli-minggao-lu-friend --source-title "千里命稿" --source-note "《千里命稿》陆维屏君友人命例，原文作：为乙巳甲申癸未丙辰。" --out ../examples/qianli-minggao-lu-friend.json
scripts.build:qianli-du-son-in-law: node bin/build-bazi-json-from-pillars.js --pillars "戊申 甲子 戊戌 戊午" --gender male --case-id qianli-minggao-du-son-in-law --source-title "千里命稿" --source-note "《千里命稿》杜霭移先生择婿命例，原文作：婿命为戊申甲子戊戍戊午；转换器已将戍规范为戌。" --out ../examples/qianli-minggao-du-son-in-law.json
scripts.test: npm run build:qianli-lu-friend && npm run build:qianli-du-son-in-law
